ios_free_app_route: PWA/Add to Home Screen via Safari
ios_native_ipa_status: Not generated. Native IPA requires macOS/Xcode and Apple signing.
android_status: Native Android WebView APK buildable on Windows after Android SDK/JDK setup.
git_policy: No Git required. GitHub sync is optional and uses PIH_MOBILE_APP_GITHUB_TOKEN/PIH_MOBILE_APP_GH_TOKEN only when the owner creates a token and runs the sync script.
